rules.passing_requires: The verification command succeeds and evidence is recorded.

bootstrap_evidence.result: passed: ruff check, pytest smoke tests (2 passed), and harness validation

features.behavior: Capture an Agent run timeline with reasoning steps, tool calls, token usage, latency, and errors.
features.evidence: 2026-05-27: Implemented AgentRun and RunEvent schemas, SQLite append-only event storage, POST/GET /v1/runs, POST/GET /v1/runs/{run_id}/events. Validation passed with ruff, 10 pytest tests, and harness validation via scripts/check.ps1.

features.behavior: Record RAG retrieval evidence with query, chunks, source metadata, hit or miss signal, and citation coverage.
features.evidence: 2026-05-27: Implemented RagEvidence, RetrievedChunk, Citation, and RagHitStatus schemas with validation for citation references and hit/miss consistency. Added POST /v1/runs/{run_id}/rag/evidence, which persists evidence as a rag_retrieval timeline event. Validation passed with ruff, 20 pytest tests, and harness validation via scripts/check.ps1.

features.behavior: Run automated answer quality checks for hallucination risk, groundedness, and trustworthiness.
features.evidence: 2026-05-28: Implemented EvaluationResult, EvaluationMetric, metric names, metric directions, and pass/warn/fail verdict computation for groundedness, citation accuracy, hallucination risk, and trustworthiness. Added POST /v1/runs/{run_id}/evaluations, which persists evaluation results as evaluation timeline events. Validation passed with ruff, 30 pytest tests, and harness validation via scripts/check.ps1.

features.behavior: Compare evaluation results across prompt or code changes to detect regressions.
features.evidence: 2026-05-28: Implemented regression comparison schemas and POST /v1/regressions/compare. Baseline and candidate evaluation results are compared with prompt/model/version metadata, metric-level quality deltas, tolerance-based regression detection, and improved/unchanged/regressed status. Final validation passed via scripts/check.ps1 with Ruff, 39 pytest tests, and harness validation.

features.behavior: Define a developer-facing run detail contract showing what the Agent thought, called, spent, and where it failed.
features.evidence: 2026-05-28: Implemented RunDetail and RunDetailSummary contracts plus GET /v1/runs/{run_id}/detail. The detail payload returns run metadata, ordered timeline, grouped messages/model calls/tool calls/RAG evidence/evaluations/errors, total token spend, and total latency. Final validation passed via scripts/check.ps1 with Ruff, 39 pytest tests, and harness validation.

features.behavior: Protect all /v1 APIs with API key authentication, scope checks, and project isolation.
features.evidence: 2026-05-28: Implemented X-AgentOps-API-Key authentication, project-bound API key credentials, ingest/read/evaluate/admin scopes, project ownership checks for run-scoped APIs, and explicit test API keys. Validation passed via scripts/check.ps1 with Ruff, 45 pytest tests, and harness validation.

features.behavior: Redact sensitive JSON fields before persistence and define trace retention configuration.
features.evidence: 2026-05-28: Implemented recursive write-before-persist redaction for run metadata and event payloads, including RAG nested metadata. Added redaction evidence under _agentops_redaction and AGENTOPS_RETENTION_DAYS configuration with default indefinite retention. Validation passed via scripts/check.ps1 with Ruff, 56 pytest tests, and harness validation.

features.behavior: Improve trace ingestion correctness with restricted generic event types, concurrent sequence safety, and run lifecycle transitions.
features.evidence: 2026-05-28: Restricted generic event ingestion to message/model_call/tool_call/error/custom, added run lifecycle endpoints for complete/fail/cancel, rejected writes after terminal status, and wrapped SQLite sequence assignment in BEGIN IMMEDIATE with busy timeout. Validation passed via scripts/check.ps1 with Ruff, 65 pytest tests, and harness validation.

features.behavior: Add scalable timeline query controls with limit, cursor, and event type filtering.
features.evidence: 2026-05-28: Added GET /v1/runs/{run_id}/events query controls with limit, after_sequence, and type filtering. Default limit is 100 and max limit is 500. Run detail now returns full summary counts with a recent 100-event timeline page. Validation passed via scripts/check.ps1 with Ruff, 71 pytest tests, and harness validation.

features.behavior: Make evaluation and regression results reproducible with evaluator/rubric versioning and persisted comparison reports.
features.evidence: 2026-05-29: Added evaluator_id/evaluator_version, rubric_id/rubric_version, judge_model, and threshold_profile to evaluation results. Added versioned golden dataset schemas and persisted regression reports with report id, project id, created_at, metric deltas, verdicts, and reproducibility metadata. Added GET /v1/regressions/reports/{report_id}. Validation passed via scripts/check.ps1 with Ruff, 78 pytest tests, and harness validation.

features.behavior: Use Xiaomi Mimo as an OpenAI-compatible LLM-as-judge provider to generate evaluation timeline events.
features.verification: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/check.ps1; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/smoke-mimo.ps1 with AGENTOPS_MIMO_API_KEY set
features.evidence: 2026-05-30: Implemented Mimo judge config, provider, POST /v1/runs/{run_id}/evaluations/judge, mock tests, .env.example placeholders, and scripts/smoke-mimo.ps1. Mock validation passed via scripts/check.ps1 with Ruff, 96 pytest tests, and harness validation. Live smoke passed with AGENTOPS_MIMO_API_KEY set locally, producing a mimo-v2.5-pro evaluation event with verdict pass.

features.behavior: Run versioned golden datasets and generate evaluation results through deterministic or external judge providers.
features.evidence: 2026-05-30: Implemented POST /v1/golden-datasets/runs with deterministic default mode, explicit Mimo judge mode through provider injection, per-case evaluation events, compact summary events, partial failure reporting, and run detail evidence. Validation passed via scripts/check.ps1 with Ruff, 109 pytest tests, and harness validation. Repository provider-key prefix scan returned no secret matches.

features.behavior: Compare golden dataset baseline and candidate runs and persist regression reports.
features.evidence: 2026-05-30: Implemented POST /v1/golden-datasets/regressions/compare. The endpoint aligns completed F12 runs by case_id, rejects running/non-dataset/mismatched evidence, persists one RegressionReport per comparable case, and returns aggregate improved/unchanged/regressed counts. Validation passed with Ruff, 122 pytest tests, and harness validation.

features.behavior: Provide a Python ingestion SDK for creating runs and writing trace, RAG, and evaluation evidence.
features.evidence: 2026-05-30: Implemented synchronous AgentOpsClient with automatic API key headers, default project_id handling, run lifecycle, timeline, RAG evidence, evaluation, judge evaluation, golden dataset, dataset regression, and report lookup helpers. SDK tests cover header behavior, API error mapping without key leakage, full run lifecycle ingestion, and dataset regression integration. Validation passed with Ruff, 126 pytest tests, and harness validation.

features.behavior: Capture LangGraph execution events with lightweight instrumentation helpers.
features.evidence: Planned after SDK boundary is stable.

features.behavior: Add a minimal trace viewer for run list, run detail, timeline, RAG evidence, evaluations, and errors.
features.evidence: Planned after ingestion ergonomics are stable.

features.behavior: Execute retention cleanup for expired trace data with dry-run and execute modes.
features.evidence: Planned after live judge and dataset workflows.

features.behavior: Harden production readiness with key hashing and rotation, audit logs, rate limits, and a PostgreSQL storage adapter.
features.evidence: Planned for multi-user or hosted deployment readiness.
